specialists.description: On-chain risk oracle for BASE SEPOLIA ONLY. Assesses any EVM address on Base Sepolia and returns a structured risk report. Cannot check other chains like Arbitrum or mainnet.

SEO affiliate-content writer with live web research. Writes a 500-700 word article grounded in real current products and prices, embedding the buyer's affiliate links, FTC disclosure enforced in code. Needs: topic, target keyword, affiliate link(s).
